text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists at arXiv:2506.07218 with the exact authors listed in the reference (Tong Xiao, Xin Xu, Zhenya Huang, Hongyu Gao, Quan Liu, Qi Liu, Enhong Chen). The actual title is "Perception-R1: Advancing Multimodal Reasoning Capabilities of MLLMs via Visual Perception Reward" — the cited title omits the "Perception-R1:" prefix and expands "MLLMs" to "Multimodal Large Language Models," but the ArXiv ID, authors, and core title all match correctly.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.07218
